title: What is Software?
subtitle: Computer ko instructions kaun deta hai?
overview: Students learn that software is a set of instructions that tells the computer what to do. Through real-life examples like games, YouTube, calculator apps, and drawing programs, students understand how software helps computers perform different tasks.

images._note: Add actual classroom photos, software screenshots, students using computers, and app examples.

gallery.caption: Software helps computers show pictures, games, and videos

gallery._placeholder: ADD: MS Paint or drawing software screenshot
gallery.caption: Drawing software helps us create art on the computer
Calculator software solves maths problems quickly
Video apps help us learn and enjoy content
Typing software helps us write on computers

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Chart showing hardware and software difference
gallery.caption: Hardware is touchable, software is instructions

keyTopics: Computer follows commands given by software
Games, apps, videos are examples of software
Typing software helps us write words

activity.title: Find the Software Around You
steps: Open Calculator and solve a simple sum
Play a song using music software
Discuss which software students use at home

options: Instructions that tell computer what to do
quiz.explanation: Software gives instructions to the computer to perform tasks.
Paint App is software because it helps the computer perform drawing tasks.
Software cannot be touched physically because it is made of programs and instructions.

quiz.q: Which software helps us draw pictures?
quiz.explanation: Paint software is used for drawing and coloring pictures.
Calculator software helps solve mathematical calculations.
Computers follow instructions given by software.
Software helps us perform many different activities on computers.
Keyboard is hardware because we can touch it physically.
Software gives step-by-step instructions just like a recipe.

quiz.q: YouTube app is an example of:
quiz.explanation: YouTube is software used for watching videos.
Typing software allows us to write letters and words on the computer.
Both hardware and software work together to make the computer useful.
Music player software helps us listen to songs.

quiz.q: What happens if a computer has no software?
quiz.explanation: Without software, a computer does not know what task to perform.
